summary: Unknown recording source but the show shines with smooth slide work on Tennessee Jed and an intriguing Shakedown Street‑style jam.
review: Reviewers note a slick, sliding guitar tone during Tennessee Jed and appreciate the mid‑set Shakedown Street riff that leads into a pre‑1975‑flavored jam. No specific recording details are given, leaving the audio source ambiguous, while the musical performance receives modest praise overall.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews give an average of 3.5 stars; comments highlight solid playing but lack recording details, leading to a moderate‑high rating with medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity, mix or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set includes a smooth Tennessee Jed performance and a middle‑section Shakedown Street riff that transitions into an early‑era jam feel.
